title: A Shimmering Void
lines: The heat haze here is so thick it feels like a wall. You see a shimmer in the distance that looks like water, but as you move, it shifts further away.
Your own shadow seems to stretch at impossible angles, as if the sun itself is vibrating.
The silences here are louder than the screams back in the village.

options.desc: 1. Stare into the heat haze until your eyes hurt
3. Follow the hallucination deep into the shifting sands
